member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.SampleRateHelper.GlobalDataStorage
member.summary: Global data storage class to store global sampleRate data.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.SampleRateHelper.GlobalDataStorage.GlobalSampleRateValue
member.summary: Gets or sets sampleRate value initialized from test method.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.SampleRateHelper.GlobalDataStorage.CurrentGlobalSampleCount
member.summary: Gets or sets current sampleRate count.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.SampleRateHelper.SampleRateGlobalHandle
member.summary: This class store the logic to perform global sample rate.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SampleRateHelper.SampleRateGlobalHandle.InitialiseGlobalSampleRate(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes global sampleRate value in sharedStorage.
member.param: Decide if dut sampling start first.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SampleRateHelper.SampleRateGlobalHandle.GetGlobalSampleRateStatus(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get the status of current sampleRate.
member.returns: True when sampling success, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.SampleRateHelper.SampleRateGlobalHandle.ExecuteGlobalDutSampling(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Execute global dutSampling, decrease counter and update latest value to sharedStorage when sampling unsuccessful.
member.returns: True when sampling success, false otherwise.
